title: Purged driver-race embargo CV around the next-lap label
summary: `PitNextLap` uses a forward one-lap horizon, so adjacent laps from the same driver-race leak label context unless validation purges nearby rows.
rationale: `PitNextLap` uses a forward one-lap horizon, so adjacent laps from the same driver-race leak label context unless validation purges nearby rows. Purged/embargoed CV is designed for overlapping forward labels and should better match leaderboard behavior than naive grouped folds.
implementation_hint: Build folds at `Race_Year` or contiguous race blocks, then within each validation fold drop training rows from the same `Driver`+`Race_Year` whose lap index is within at least 1 lap of any validation row; compare ordinary GroupKFold vs purged+embargo CV on the same baseline.
expected_effect: Likely no direct feature gain, but should reduce optimistic local CV and improve model/ensemble selection stability for LB-facing experiments.
risk: Can lower apparent CV and reduce training data enough to hide small real gains if the purge window is too wide.
